text: Here, in this dimly-lit hallway, I sense a tension between anticipation and emptiness. The darkness beyond the glass implies uncertainty, yet the illuminated paths signal invitation or escape. Entering the next space, I find myself immersed in a zone dedicated to research and development—words and displays on the wall generate thoughts about human curiosity and machine intelligence. I feel small in the vast realms of innovation and slightly uneasy, as if traversing the borderland between the present and the unknown future.
